rulings.Case Title: WENDY HOUGH ET AL VS. TODD COURAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs TODD COURAGE, MARK HAMILTON, CHRISTOPHER SCORFINA, and LYNNE SCHWARTZHOFF's Motion To Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records granted in part and denied in part. Defendant's motion (1) to limit the documents to the time period from July 1, 2012, to present is GRANTED; and (2) the motion to redact documents is GRANTED as follows: custodian of records for Sean Condry may redact from the records any or all of the individual defendants' personal payment source information including defendant's bank account numbers, payment institution, credit card account information, or social security numbers, but may not redact the amount of any invoices or any third party payment source information if the invoices were paid by persons or entities other than defendants. Motion is otherwise DENIED. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2018 line 3. Order To Show Cause DENIED. Moving party failed to show likelihood of success on the merits. Additionally, equities do not weigh in Plaintiffs' favor. Plaintiffs obtained a mortgage loan in 2005. Plaintiff's stopped payments on the loan in 2011. Defendants advanced over $70,000 to cover insurance and taxes on the property, which is used by Plaintiffs rent and mortgage free for over 7 years. Plaintiffs do not offer to post the payments to become current on their loan. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOY, SHUEN, AS TRUSTEE OF THE SHUEN CHUN CHOY AND et al VS. DAN LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Stipulated Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 15, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFFs CHOY, SHUEN, AS TRUSTEE OF THE SHUEN CHUN CHOY AND, CHOY, SUSANA, AS TRUSTEE OF THE SHUEN CHUN CHOY's Motion To Enforce Stipulated Settlement DENIED. The Court has no jurisdiction.
